content: Link/mention spam ratios: per-pubkey fraction of events containing URLs, count of distinct vs repeated domains (one domain across many events => promo blast), URL-shortener prevalence. Mention spam: mass p-tag mentions per event and across events (tagging many strangers). Hashtag stuffing: t-tag count per event, repeated identical hashtag sets. All are simple counters/ratios over content+tags, O(events*tags), very fast. False positives: legit news/aggregator accounts post many links; popular hashtags are normal. Tunable thresholds per ratio; best as weighted features not hard cutoffs.
